notes: Breakout strategy overhaul: confirmation candle now requires body >= 50% of range (single candle). TF-aware confirmation: M5/M15 uses M1, H1 uses M5, H4 uses M15. TP defaults by TF: M5=1.25R, M15=2R, H1/H4=trail only. Added Trade Decision Logger - every setup prints full PASS/FAIL breakdown. Loosened ATR filter (15 to 5 pip minimum).
